title: Rebrand site to 'Rahul Cyber Cafe' across all pages and SEO

requirements.text: Update the business name to 'Rahul Cyber Cafe' across every frontend file where the cafe's name appears. This includes: the Navbar logo/brand text, the Footer brand name, the Home page hero section and any headings that reference the business name, the Contact page business name display, and any other in-page text that currently reads 'Internet Cafe', 'Internet Cafe Services', or a generic placeholder name.
acceptanceCriteria: Navbar logo/brand text displays 'Rahul Cyber Cafe'
Footer brand name displays 'Rahul Cyber Cafe'
Home page hero heading includes 'Rahul Cyber Cafe'
Contact page business name displays 'Rahul Cyber Cafe'
No page shows the old generic name 'Internet Cafe Services' or 'Internet Cafe' as the business name

requirements.text: Update all SEO metadata site-wide to use 'Rahul Cyber Cafe' as the business name. This includes: the <title> tag and all meta description, Open Graph (og:title, og:site_name), Twitter card, and JSON-LD LocalBusiness 'name' field in frontend/index.html; and the per-page SEO titles and descriptions in SEOHead calls on the Home, Services, and Contact pages. The page titles should follow the pattern 'Rahul Cyber Cafe — [Page Subtitle]' and meta descriptions should reference 'Rahul Cyber Cafe' by name.

quotes: google pe search pe kis naam pe aayega

acceptanceCriteria: og:title and og:site_name contain 'Rahul Cyber Cafe'
JSON-LD LocalBusiness 'name' field is 'Rahul Cyber Cafe'
Home page SEO title contains 'Rahul Cyber Cafe'
Services page SEO title contains 'Rahul Cyber Cafe'
Contact page SEO title contains 'Rahul Cyber Cafe'
All meta descriptions reference 'Rahul Cyber Cafe' by name

constraints: Do not change the phone number (9220270576) or address ('Shop, Hotel SKY Blue WALI GALI, Mahipalpur, Delhi') — these must remain as-is
Do not add back any pricing information to service cards
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
nonGoals: Changing the visual theme or color scheme
